debug_info.goal:
A : Type u
inst✝⁵ : CommRing A
inst✝⁴ : IsNoetherianRing A
inst✝³ : @HeightOneLocalizationIsPID A inst✝⁵
M : Type u_1
inst✝² : AddCommGroup M
inst✝¹ : Module A M
inst✝ : Module.Finite A M
hMT : IsTorsion A M
⊢ ∃ ι x p,
    ∃ (_ : ∀ (i : ι), (p i).asIdeal.primeHeight = 1),
      ∃ e, ∃ (_ : ∀ (i : ι), 0 < e i), M ∼ₚᵢₛ[A] ((i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).asIdeal ^ e i)

failed_attempts:
let sigma := (Module.support A M) ∩ {p : PrimeSpectrum A | p.1.primeHeight = 1}
  have hfin : sigma.Finite := Module.IsTorsion.finite_primeHeight_one_support hMT
  let S := ⨅ p ∈ sigma, p.1.primeCompl
  rcases sigma.eq_empty_or_nonempty with hsigma | hsigma_ne
  · refine ⟨Empty, Empty.fintype, Empty.elim, Empty.elim, Empty.elim, Empty.elim, ?_⟩
    rw [Module.isPseudoIsomorphic_iff_pseudoZero_left, Module.isPseudoZero_iff_primeHeight_one_support_subset]
    simp [sigma, hsigma] at hfin ⊢
    exact hfin
  · have h_pid_inst := HeightOneLocalizationIsPID.isPrincipalIdealRing_localization sigma (Set.inter_subset_right _ _) hsigma_ne hfin
    let L := Localization S
    haveI : IsDomain L := h_pid_inst.1
    haveI : IsPrincipalIdealRing L := h_pid_inst.2
    let decomp := Module.equivDirectSumOfIsTorsion L (LocalizedModule S M)
    let I (i : decomp.ι) := decomp.module_R i
    let x (i : decomp.ι) := (I i).isPrincipal_generator
    let factors (i : decomp.ι) := (UniqueFactorizationMonoid.normalizedFactors (x i)).toFinset
    let ι := Σ (i : decomp.ι), factors i
    let p_L (k : ι) : PrimeSpectrum L :=
      ⟨Ideal.span {k.2.val}, Ideal.isPrime_of_prime (UniqueFactorizationMonoid.prime_of_normalized_factor k.2.prop)⟩
    let p (k : ι) : PrimeSpectrum A := p_L k |>.comap (algebraMap A L)
    let e (k : ι) : ℕ := UniqueFactorizationMonoid.multiplicity k.2.val (x k.1)
    have hp (k : ι) : (p k).1.primeHeight = 1 := by
      have : p_L k ∈ Set.range (PrimeSpectrum.comap (algebraMap A L)) := ⟨p k, rfl⟩
      rw [PrimeSpectrum.localization_comap_range_eq_of_isDomain_of_primeHeight_eq_one L sigma (Set.inter_subset_right _ _) hsigma_ne hfin] at this
      rcases this with h | h
      · exact (Set.mem_setOf.mp h).2
      · have : (p_L k).asIdeal ≠ ⊥ := Ideal.ne_bot_of_prime (UniqueFactorizationMonoid.prime_of_normalized_factor k.2.prop)
        rw [Set.mem_singleton_iff] at h
        apply (this _).elim
        rw [h]; rfl
    have he (k : ι) : 0 < e k := by
      rw [e, UniqueFactorizationMonoid.multiplicity_pos_iff_mem_normalizedFactors_of_no_units]
      · exact k.2.prop
      · intro h
        have := Module.IsTorsion.annihilator_ne_bot (R := L) (M := (LocalizedModule S M)) (decomp.symm (DirectSum.lof _ _ _ k.1 1))
        simp only [h] at this
        rw [← Ideal.span_singleton_eq_bot, ← (I k.1).span_singleton_generator] at this
        exact this rfl
    refine ⟨ι, inferInstance, p, hp, e, he, ?_⟩
    rw [LinearMap.isPseudoIsomorphism_iff_bijective_map hMT]
    · let N := (i : ι) → A ⧸ (p i).1 ^ (e i)
      have hsupp : (Module.support A M ∪ Module.support A N) ∩ {p | p.asIdeal.primeHeight = 1} = sigma := by
        ext p; constructor <;> intro h
        · rcases h.1 with h1 | h1
          · exact ⟨h1, h.2⟩
          · rw [Module.support_pi, Set.mem_iUnion] at h1
            obtain ⟨k, hk⟩ := h1
            rw [Module.support_quotient, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Ideal.isPrime_iff.mp p.2, Ideal.radical_pow_of_prime] at hk
            rw [hk]
            exact hp k ▸ ⟨(hp k).symm ▸ p.2, rfl⟩
        · refine ⟨Or.inl h.1, h.2⟩
      rw [hsupp]
      let iso_L : (LocalizedModule S M) ≃ₗ[L] LocalizedModule S N := by
        refine decomp.trans (LinearEquiv.trans ?_ (LocalizedModule.iso_pi_of_fintype S _).symm)
        refine Dfinsupp.mapRange.linearEquiv (fun i => ?_)
        let y := x i
        have : Ideal.span {y} = I i := (I i).span_singleton_generator
        rw [← this, Ideal.quotientEquivPiSpanCoprimeFactors L (Ideal.span {y}) (y) rfl]
        refine LinearEquiv.piCongrRight (fun q => ?_)
        dsimp
        have : IsLocalization (p (⟨i, q⟩ : ι)).asIdeal.primeCompl L :=
           IsLocalization.isLocalization_of_isLocalization_of_isPrime_disjoint S L _ (hp ⟨i, q⟩ ▸ (Set.mem_setOf.mp (hp ⟨i, q⟩)).1)
        rw [← LocalizedModule.quotient_pow_prime_iso_of_isLocalization S (p (⟨i, q⟩ : ι)).asIdeal (p_L ⟨i, q⟩).asIdeal (e ⟨i, q⟩) rfl]
        rfl
      exact iso_L.toEquiv.bijective
    · exact Module.IsTorsion.pi (fun i _ => Module.IsTorsion.of_isTorsion_ring_topology (p i).asIdeal (p i).1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors)
